name: From Geneva or Geneva Airport: transfer to popular places in the French Alps
description: Discover From Geneva or Geneva Airport: transfer to popular places in the French Alps in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover From Geneva or Geneva Airport: transfer to popular places in the French Alps in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Transfer
subcategory.description: Book a transfer and get to your destination comfortably. A transfer is made by car or bus between two places. Very often it is a transfer from or to the airport. For bookable transfers, the starting point or destination is usually fixed (for example, the airport in Geneva). For the opposite, a city or place is fixed. Private transfers ensure you and your fellow travelers a comfortable ride to the destination

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Avoriaz: impressive mountain landscape with green valleys and white peaks in summer.
Chamonix: The cable car offers a breathtaking view of the snow-covered mountains and nature in the Alps.
Courmayeur: picturesque mountain village with beautiful peaks and clear air in the Alps.
Courchevel: Winter alpine landscape with snowy chalets and mountain view in the French Alps.
Flaine: winter landscape with snow-covered mountains and modern chalets in France.
Les Gets: Skiing in fresh snow among tall trees in the Alps.
Megève: Idyllic by the lake, surrounded by mountains and green nature in winter.
Megève: Winter landscape with snow-covered trees and gentle hills.
Morzine: Skiing in winter with breathtaking mountain scenery and snow-covered forests
Tignes: Snowy landscape with mountains and a ski area in winter.
Val d'Isere: beautiful winter landscape with chalets and snow-covered mountains
Val Thorens: Skiing in the Alps, winter activity in breathtaking mountain scenery
